overall.description: First-person vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night. The footage shows a journey from narrow urban streets into a neon-lit downtown plaza, past the iconic 'softsys' building with large holographic advertisements, and through covered overpasses. The scene features heavy rain, neon lighting, and futuristic architecture typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

vehicle accelerates from slow speed to moderate cruising speed

distant cluster of skyscrapers with glowing windows and neon lights visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person vehicle view driving through a narrow urban street flanked by modern glass buildings. Rain streaks across the windshield as the vehicle accelerates, and the enclosed street gradually opens up to reveal a distant neon-lit skyline of downtown skyscrapers.

events.description: large holographic billboards become visible on the left side of the street
softsys building with large green neon signage enters view on the left

agents.ego_description: cruising through the open downtown plaza, approaching the softsys building district with large digital advertisements

large floating holographic billboard displaying purple and yellow fashion advertisements
tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a wide-open downtown plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. Large holographic advertisements float above the street, and the distinctive softsys building with its bright green neon signage becomes prominent on the left as the vehicle approaches the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large brand advertisements and covered roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows as it approaches the softsys building entrance, dominated by a massive 'FERVID' perfume advertisement. The environment transitions from open plaza to a semi-covered space as the vehicle passes under a large concrete overpass, with lighting shifting from neon-bright to shadowed.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with modern high-rise buildings

events.description: vehicle exits the covered overpass area back into open street with tall buildings
vehicle accelerates while navigating through the city street with neon-lit skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the city street after exiting the overpass, navigating between tall glass buildings

large vertical screen displaying animated cyberpunk-style advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the vehicle returns to the rain-soaked open street lined with towering glass skyscrapers featuring vertical neon lighting. The vehicle accelerates through this canyon of modern architecture, with digital advertisement screens visible on the right as the journey continues deeper into the neon-lit metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person vehicle journey that transitions from a narrow urban corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched downtown plaza. It begins by accelerating through a tight street flanked by glass buildings, where rain streaks the windshield before the view opens up to reveal a distant skyline of towering skyscrapers. As the vehicle emerges into the wide-open plaza, the environment expands to feature floating holographic advertisements and the bright green neon signage of the softsys building. The scene then shifts from the bright open air into the shadows of a semi-covered concrete overpass, passing beneath a massive perfume advertisement. Finally, the vehicle exits the overpass and accelerates back into the rain-soaked open street, driving through a canyon of glass skyscrapers and vertical digital screens.
